insert-page-range-into-pdf.title: Insert Page Range from One PDF into Another
insert-page-range-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a specific range of pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

insert-pages-from-pdf-stream.title: Insert Pages from PDF Stream into Another PDF
insert-pages-from-pdf-stream.description: Shows how to insert a range of pages from a source PDF stream into a destination PDF stream using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

insert-specific-pages-into-pdf.title: Insert Specific Pages from One PDF into Another
insert-specific-pages-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert selected pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF at a specified position using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

insert-selected-pdf-pages-using-streams.title: Insert Selected PDF Pages Using Streams
insert-selected-pdf-pages-using-streams.description: Demonstrates how to insert specific pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF at a given position by working directly with file streams using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

insert-pages-at-beginning-using-pdffilee.title: Insert Pages at Beginning of PDF using PdfFileEditor
insert-pages-at-beginning-using-pdffilee.description: Demonstrates how to prepend all pages from a source PDF to another PDF by using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.Insert method.

insert-pages-into-middle-of-pdf.title: Insert Pages from One PDF into the Middle of Another PDF
insert-pages-into-middle-of-pdf.description: Shows how to insert all pages of a source PDF into the middle of a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

append-pdf-pages-to-another-document.title: Append PDF Pages to Another Document
append-pdf-pages-to-another-document.description: Demonstrates how to append all pages from a source PDF to the end of a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Document and PdfFileEditor classes.

insert-pdf-pages-from-memory.title: Insert PDF Pages from Memory Streams
insert-pdf-pages-from-memory.description: Demonstrates how to insert selected pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF entirely in memory using Aspose.Pdf and output the merged document to a MemoryStream.

batch-insert-page-ranges-into-pdf.title: Batch Insert Page Ranges into PDF
batch-insert-page-ranges-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert specific page ranges from multiple source PDFs into a single destination PDF in a loop using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

append-page-ranges-multiple-pdfs.title: Append Page Ranges from Multiple PDFs Using TryAppend
append-page-ranges-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.TryAppend to insert the same page range from several source PDFs into a base PDF in a single operation.

load-pdf-and-save.title: Load PDF and Save to New File
load-pdf-and-save.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF from a file path using Aspose.Pdf Document class and save it to another location.

load-pdf-with-pdf-file-editor.title: Load PDF and Use PdfFileEditor for File Operations
load-pdf-with-pdf-file-editor.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Document and shows how to employ PdfFileEditor for file‑level operations such as splitting without binding the document.

insert-pages-into-pdf-and-save.title: Insert Pages into PDF and Save Result
insert-pages-into-pdf-and-save.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to insert selected pages from one PDF into another at a specific position and write the modified document directly to an output file.

save-pdf-to-memorystream-using-pdfviewer.title: Save PDF to MemoryStream using PdfViewer
save-pdf-to-memorystream-using-pdfviewer.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer, optionally modifying it, and saving the processed document directly to a MemoryStream without any disk I/O.

split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified End Page
split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page.description: Shows how to extract the first N pages of a PDF and save them as a new document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page__v2.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified End Page
split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page__v2.description: Shows how to split a PDF in memory using streams, extracting pages 1 through a given end page with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

split-pdf-into-bulk-page-ranges.title: Split PDF into Bulk Page Ranges
split-pdf-into-bulk-page-ranges.description: Shows how to split a PDF into multiple bulk page sets defined by start‑end page pairs and save each set as a separate PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets.title: Split PDF into Bulk Page Sets Using MemoryStreams
split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into multiple page ranges (bulks) with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and obtain each bulk as a MemoryStream.

split-pdf-from-page-to-end.title: Split PDF from Specific Page to End
split-pdf-from-page-to-end.description: Shows how to extract pages from a given start page to the end of a PDF and save the result using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

split-pdf-from-start-to-end.title: Split PDF from Start Page to End Using Streams
split-pdf-from-start-to-end.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF document from a specified start page to the last page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and return the result as a MemoryStream.

split-pdf-into-individual-pages.title: Split PDF into Individual Page PDFs
split-pdf-into-individual-pages.description: Shows how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with a filename template.

split-pdf-into-individual-page-files.title: Split PDF into Individual Page Files Using Streams
split-pdf-into-individual-page-files.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDFs by reading the source as a stream, using PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages, and writing each resulting MemoryStream to a file.

split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.title: Split PDF into Single-Page PDFs Using PdfFileEditor
split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to split a source PDF into individual page PDFs by using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages and writing each MemoryStream to a uniquely named file.

concatenate-split-pdfs.title: Concatenate Split PDFs into a Single Document
concatenate-split-pdfs.description: Shows how to merge a series of split PDF files into one PDF by iteratively inserting pages using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.Insert.

extract-first-pages-pdf-splitfromfirst.title: Extract First Pages from PDF with SplitFromFirst
extract-first-pages-pdf-splitfromfirst.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitFromFirst to create a new PDF containing pages from the beginning up to a specified page number.

extract-first-n-pages-pdf-splitfromfirst.title: Extract First N Pages from PDF Using SplitFromFirst and MemoryStream
extract-first-n-pages-pdf-splitfromfirst.description: Demonstrates how to extract pages 1 through a specified end page from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitFromFirst with in‑memory streams, and optionally save the result to a file.

split-pdf-into-multiple-page-ranges.title: Split PDF into Multiple Page Ranges Using SplitToBulks
split-pdf-into-multiple-page-ranges.description: Shows how to split a PDF into separate documents based on defined page ranges by using the PdfFileEditor.SplitToBulks method and saving each resulting MemoryStream to a file.

split-pdf-into-bulk-ranges.title: Split PDF into Bulk Ranges Using MemoryStreams
split-pdf-into-bulk-ranges.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToBulks to split a PDF into defined page ranges and obtain each bulk as a MemoryStream, then save them to separate files.

split-pdf-from-page-to-end__v2.title: Split PDF from a Start Page to the End
split-pdf-from-page-to-end__v2.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToEnd to extract the rear portion of a PDF starting at a specified page.

split-pdf-from-start-page-to-end.title: Split PDF from a Start Page to End Using Streams
split-pdf-from-start-page-to-end.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToEnd with input and output streams to extract the rear part of a PDF starting from a specified page.

split-pdf-into-individual-pages__v2.title: Split PDF into Individual Page PDFs
split-pdf-into-individual-pages__v2.description: Shows how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and its SplitToPages method.

split-pdf-into-individual-page-streams.title: Split PDF into Individual Page Streams
split-pdf-into-individual-page-streams.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to split a PDF into separate one‑page MemoryStream objects, which can then be saved or processed individually.

delete-pages-from-pdf-file-path.title: Delete Pages 2‑5 from PDF Using File‑Path Overload
delete-pages-from-pdf-file-path.description: Demonstrates how to remove specific pages (2‑5) from a PDF file by using the PdfFileEditor.Delete method that works with file paths.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF using PdfFileEditor
delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to remove selected pages from a PDF by providing input and output streams to Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor facade.

remove-the-first-and-last-pages-of-a-pdf.title: Remove The First And Last Pages Of A Pdf Using An Integer Array With The Delete Method

batch-delete-pages-from-pdfs.title: Batch Delete Pages from Multiple PDFs
batch-delete-pages-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder and remove specified pages from each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

delete-pages-from-pdf-verify-count.title: Delete Pages from PDF and Verify Page Count
delete-pages-from-pdf-verify-count.description: Demonstrates how to remove specific pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and then confirm the page count reduction with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer.

concatenate-three-pdfs-pdffileeditor.title: Concatenate Three PDFs with PdfFileEditor
concatenate-three-pdfs-pdffileeditor.description: Demonstrates merging three PDF files into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor’s three‑argument Concatenate method, with temporary file handling for intermediate results.

merge-multiple-pdf-streams.title: Merge Multiple PDF Streams into a Single PDF
merge-multiple-pdf-streams.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate several PDF input streams into one output PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

concatenate-two-pdfs-using-pdffileeditor.title: Concatenate Two PDFs Using PdfFileEditor
concatenate-two-pdfs-using-pdffileeditor.description: Demonstrates how to merge two existing PDF files into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor Concatenate overload.

concatenate-pdfs-from-memory-streams.title: Concatenate PDFs from Memory Streams to a File
concatenate-pdfs-from-memory-streams.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF documents held in memory streams into a single PDF file using Aspose.Pdf without creating temporary files.

batch-concatenate-pdfs.title: Batch Concatenate PDFs in a Folder
batch-concatenate-pdfs.description: Shows how to gather all PDF files from a directory and merge them into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

concatenate-multiple-pdfs-measure-time.title: Concatenate Multiple PDFs and Measure Execution Time
concatenate-multiple-pdfs-measure-time.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate fifty small PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor stream overloads and measures the operation duration with Stopwatch.

compare-memory-usage-file-path-stream-pd.title: Compare Memory Usage of File-Path vs Stream Overloads for PDF Concatenation
compare-memory-usage-file-path-stream-pd.description: Creates two simple PDF files and concatenates them using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor, measuring memory consumption for the file-path overload and the stream overload to illustrate their memory impact.

create-pdf-booklet.title: Create Booklet PDF with Aspose.PdfFileEditor
create-pdf-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF from an existing document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with default settings.

create-booklet-a5-page-size.title: Create Booklet with Custom A5 Page Size
create-booklet-a5-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF with A5 page dimensions from an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet overload.

create-booklet-with-custom-odd-even-page.title: Create Booklet with Custom Odd/Even Pages
create-booklet-with-custom-odd-even-page.description: The example loads a PDF, separates odd and even page numbers into left‑hand and right‑hand page lists, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet to generate a booklet where odd pages appear on the left and even pages on the right.

create-booklet-with-streams-custom-page-.title: Create Booklet from PDF with Streams and Custom Page Size
create-booklet-with-streams-custom-page-.description: Shows how to generate a booklet from an existing PDF using streams and then apply a custom page dimension such as A5 to each page.

create-pdf-booklets.title: Create Booklet PDFs from Multiple Files
create-pdf-booklets.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF for each source PDF in a directory, placing each output in its own subfolder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-pages-and-create-booklet.title: Delete Pages and Create Booklet from PDF
delete-pages-and-create-booklet.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF and then generate a booklet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

delete-pages-concatenate-pdfs.title: Delete Pages and Concatenate PDFs with PdfFileEditor
delete-pages-concatenate-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove specific pages from a PDF and then merge the edited PDF with another document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor facade.

delete-specific-pages-pdf-error-handling.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF with Error Handling
delete-specific-pages-pdf-error-handling.description: Demonstrates how to remove selected pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and includes checks for missing input files and PDF‑specific exception handling.

create-pdf-booklet-with-audit-logging.title: Create PDF Booklet with Audit Logging
create-pdf-booklet-with-audit-logging.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor and log each step of the process to a text file for audit purposes.

create-booklet-custom-page-order.title: Create Booklet with Custom Left/Right Page Order
create-booklet-custom-page-order.description: Demonstrates how to generate a simple PDF, define custom left and right page arrays, and use PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet to reorder pages into a booklet, then verifies the order by extracting page text.

resize-pdf-to-letter-size.title: Resize PDF to Letter Size Using PdfPageEditor
resize-pdf-to-letter-size.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, change its page dimensions to US Letter (8.5" x 11") using PdfPageEditor, and save the resized document to a new file.

resize-pdf-pages-to-custom-dimensions.title: Resize PDF Pages to Custom Dimensions Using Stream Overload
resize-pdf-pages-to-custom-dimensions.description: Demonstrates how to set a custom page size of 8.5×11 inches for all pages in a PDF by using PdfFileEditor’s stream‑based ResizeContents method with page resize parameters.

batch-resize-pdfs-to-a4.title: Batch Resize PDFs to A4
batch-resize-pdfs-to-a4.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and resize each document to A4 page size using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor.

compare-file-path-and-stream-overloads-p.title: Compare File‑Path and Stream Overloads for PDF Resizing
compare-file-path-and-stream-overloads-p.description: Demonstrates how to resize a large PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor via both file‑path and stream overloads and measures their execution time.

create-2up-pdf-layout.title: Create 2-up PDF Layout Using PdfFileEditor
create-2up-pdf-layout.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to combine two pages side‑by‑side into a 2‑up PDF and save the result.

apply-4up-layout-to-pdf-via-stream.title: Apply 4‑up Layout to PDF via Stream Overload
apply-4up-layout-to-pdf-via-stream.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to create a 4‑up (2×2) PDF by processing input and output streams, including generating a source PDF in memory when the file is missing.

batch-create-3x2-nup-pdfs.title: Batch Create 3x2 N‑up PDFs
batch-create-3x2-nup-pdfs.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder and generates N‑up versions with three columns and two rows using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

create-booklet-with-nup-layout.title: Create Booklet PDF Using N‑up Layout
create-booklet-with-nup-layout.description: Demonstrates how to generate an N‑up version of a PDF and then convert it into a booklet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

delete-pages-resize-pdf.title: Delete Pages and Resize PDF Content
delete-pages-resize-pdf.description: Shows how to remove specific pages from a PDF and then scale the remaining pages' contents using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

remove-pages-from-multiple-pdfs-in-paral.title: Remove Pages from Multiple PDFs in Parallel
remove-pages-from-multiple-pdfs-in-paral.description: Demonstrates how to delete specified pages from several PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

concatenate-pdfs-using-streams.title: Concatenate PDFs Using Streams
concatenate-pdfs-using-streams.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF files into a single PDF by passing input and output streams to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

pdffileeditor-delete-out-of-range-test.title: PdfFileEditor Delete Throws Exception for Out‑Of‑Range Page Numbers
pdffileeditor-delete-out-of-range-test.description: Demonstrates a unit test that verifies PdfFileEditor.Delete throws an ArgumentOutOfRangeException when a specified page number exceeds the PDF's total pages.

create-booklet-pdf-from-stream.title: Create Booklet PDF from Stream
create-booklet-pdf-from-stream.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor to convert an input PDF stream into a booklet PDF and return it as a MemoryStream.

create-pdf-booklet-custom-page-order.title: Create PDF Booklet with Custom Page Order
create-pdf-booklet-custom-page-order.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF by defining left and right page sequences and using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet.

create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom Page Size
create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF from an existing PDF stream using Aspose.Pdf, specifying a custom 5.5×8.5‑inch page size.

validate-pdf-concatenation-page-order.title: Validate PDF Concatenation Preserves Page Order
validate-pdf-concatenation-page-order.description: The example concatenates two PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and then verifies that the merged document retains the original page order by comparing each page's dimensions.

delete-pages-3-4-from-pdfs.title: Delete Pages 3 and 4 from PDFs
delete-pages-3-4-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to remove specific pages (3 and 4) from each PDF in a folder using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor facade and save the results to another directory.

merge-multiple-pdfs-with-logging.title: Merge Multiple PDFs with Logging using Aspose.Pdf
merge-multiple-pdfs-with-logging.description: Shows how to load several PDF files, log each input and output operation, merge them into a single document, and save the result using Aspose.Pdf.

create-booklet-odd-left-pages.title: Create Booklet PDF with Odd Left Pages Using PdfFileEditor
create-booklet-odd-left-pages.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF from a stream with Aspose.Pdf, assigning odd-numbered pages to the left side by using PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet.

resize-pdf-pages-to-custom-dimensions__v.title: Resize PDF Pages to Custom Dimensions Using PdfFileEditor
resize-pdf-pages-to-custom-dimensions__v.description: Demonstrates how to resize all pages of a PDF to 1024 × 768 points using the PdfFileEditor stream overload and then verifies the new page size.

batch-delete-pages-merge-pdfs.title: Batch Delete Pages and Merge PDFs
batch-delete-pages-merge-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove specified pages from several PDF files and then concatenate the cleaned PDFs into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

concatenate-multiple-pdfs.title: Concatenate Multiple PDFs into a Single Document
concatenate-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to merge several PDF files into one using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor. The program validates input files and writes the combined PDF to a user‑specified path.

merge-pdf-streams-to-single-file.title: Merge PDF Streams to a Single File without Intermediate Files
merge-pdf-streams-to-single-file.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate multiple PDF streams (e.g., from network sources) directly into a merged PDF saved to disk using Aspose.Pdf.Facades without creating temporary files.

validate-makebooklet-null-pagesize.title: Validate MakeBooklet Throws on Null PageSize
validate-makebooklet-null-pagesize.description: Creates a temporary PDF and calls PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet with a null pageSize to demonstrate that an ArgumentNullException is thrown, then cleans up the files.

delete-pdf-pages-get-size.title: Delete Specific PDF Pages and Return File Size
delete-pdf-pages-get-size.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and obtain the size of the resulting document.

concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-pages.title: Concatenate PDFs with Blank Page Separator
concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-pages.description: Demonstrates how to merge multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf while automatically inserting a blank page between each document.

batch-resize-pdfs-a5-booklet.title: Batch Resize PDFs to A5 and Create Booklets
batch-resize-pdfs-a5-booklet.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, resize each page to A5 dimensions, and then generate a booklet version of the resized document using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pages-create-two-up-pdf.title: Delete Pages and Create 2‑up PDF Layout
delete-pages-create-two-up-pdf.description: Shows how to remove specified pages from a PDF stream and then apply a 2‑up (two pages per sheet) layout, outputting the result to another stream.

create-booklet-pdf-with-specified-page-o.title: Create Booklet PDF with Specified Page Order
create-booklet-pdf-with-specified-page-o.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades by specifying left and right page sequences.

concatenate-pdfs-preserve-metadata.title: Concatenate PDFs and Preserve Original Metadata
concatenate-pdfs-preserve-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to merge multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor while copying logical structure, outlines, and user rights, and then copies metadata from the first source PDF to the merged document.

create-booklet-pdf-delete-pages-resize.title: Create Booklet PDF by Deleting Pages and Resizing Content
create-booklet-pdf-delete-pages-resize.description: Demonstrates how to take an input PDF stream, remove specified pages, resize the remaining pages, and generate a booklet PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-booklet-pdfs-various-page-sizes.title: Create Booklet PDFs with Various Page Sizes
create-booklet-pdfs-various-page-sizes.description: The example generates sample PDFs with different page dimensions, then uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet to produce booklet versions and validates the resulting page counts.

concatenate-pdfs-from-zip.title: Concatenate PDFs from a ZIP Archive and Save Back
concatenate-pdfs-from-zip.description: The example reads all PDF files stored in a ZIP archive, merges them into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and writes the merged document back into the same archive.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdf__v2.title: Delete Specific Pages from a PDF
delete-specific-pages-from-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and write the modified document to a new file via a command‑line interface.

parallel-delete-pages-from-pdfs.title: Parallel Deletion of Pages from Multiple PDFs
parallel-delete-pages-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to delete specified pages from a batch of PDF files concurrently with Parallel.ForEach, improving processing throughput.

rotate-pdf-landscape-create-booklet.title: Rotate PDF to Landscape and Create Booklet
rotate-pdf-landscape-create-booklet.description: The example rotates all pages of a PDF to landscape orientation using PdfPageEditor and then generates a booklet from the rotated document with PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet. It also demonstrates creating a simple source PDF when none is present.

test-pdffileeditor-concatenate-empty-str.title: Unit Test PdfFileEditor Concatenate with Empty Streams
test-pdffileeditor-concatenate-empty-str.description: Shows how to write NUnit unit tests that verify PdfFileEditor.Concatenate throws an ArgumentException for an empty input stream array and that TryConcatenate returns false.

concatenate-multiple-pdfs__v2.title: Concatenate Multiple PDFs into a Single Document
concatenate-multiple-pdfs__v2.description: Shows how to merge several PDF files into one PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor in a console application.

delete-pdf-pages-with-audit-logging.title: Delete PDF Pages with Audit Logging
delete-pdf-pages-with-audit-logging.description: Demonstrates removing specific pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Document API and optionally the PdfFileEditor facade while logging the number of pages deleted for audit trails.

resize-pdfs-create-booklet.title: Resize PDFs and Create a Booklet
resize-pdfs-create-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to resize PDF pages to 1024x768, concatenate multiple PDFs, and generate a booklet PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-specified-pages-from-pdfs.title: Delete Specified Pages from PDFs
delete-specified-pages-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to remove given pages from multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and save the cleaned versions.

concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-separator.title: Concatenate PDFs with Blank Separator Pages
concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-separator.description: Shows how to create a one‑page blank PDF and insert it between multiple PDF documents while concatenating them using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdfs-and-merge.title: Resize PDFs and Merge into a Single Document
resize-pdfs-and-merge.description: Demonstrates how to batch resize multiple PDF files to 1024x768 using PdfFileEditor.ResizeContents and then concatenate them into one PDF with PdfFileEditor.Concatenate.

delete-and-resize-pdf-pages.title: Delete and Resize PDF Pages
delete-and-resize-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF, resize the remaining page contents, and return the processed document as a MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

concatenate-pdfs-add-page-numbers.title: Concatenate PDFs and Add Page Numbers
concatenate-pdfs-add-page-numbers.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF files into a single document and automatically insert page numbers using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-a-function-that-generates-a-bookl.title: Create A Function That Generates A Booklet Using Left Pages From The First Half Of The Source Pdf

create-booklet-from-second-half-right-pa.title: Create Booklet from Second Half Right Pages
create-booklet-from-second-half-right-pa.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF using only the right‑hand (odd) pages from the second half of a source PDF by leveraging Aspose.Pdf's Document and PdfFileEditor classes.
